mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5 percent within a single month, labor market deterioration triggers risk-off positioning and earnings downgrade expectations, depressing S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the predictive Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in real GDP growth and a decline in industrial production indicates synchronized demand and supply weakness, forcing equity risk premiums higher and compressing forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative quarterly returns in more than 50 percent of out-of-sample instances, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment where CPI exceeds 3.5 percent, further Fed fund rate hikes fail to anchor inflation expectations and instead trigger recession fears, causing equity drawdowns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive or neutral when CPI exceeds the threshold and rates rise, or the conditional Sharpe ratio does not differ significantly from the unconditional sample (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and housing starts reflect expanding consumer spending and business investment, which directly lift corporate revenue forecasts and drive positive S&P 500 returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: The composite demand index fails to maintain a positive Rank IC above 0.04 over any 12-month rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical difference from zero (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below 100.0, manufacturing sector contraction signals supply chain bottlenecks resolving into demand destruction, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when INDPRO breaches the threshold, or the signal predictive power vanishes (Rank IC < 0.02) over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with declining payroll employment confirms a labor market breakdown, accelerating earnings recession expectations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal fails to predict negative quarterly returns in more than 50 percent of instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a rolling regression.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid housing market cooling where housing starts fall below 1.2 million units, construction sector drag amplifies broader economic slowdown fears, depressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when housing starts breach the threshold, or the conditional forward return differential fails to reach statistical significance (p > 0.05) over a 2-year window.
